name: LIDR - Kimi/DeepSeek
postCreateCommand: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv python install 3.11 && uv venv && uv pip install openai litellm fastapi uvicorn psycopg2-binary pandas jupyter ipykernel && uv run ipython kernel install --user --name=lidr && echo '>>> Entorno listo'
postStartCommand: docker --version && docker compose version && uv --version && uv run fastapi --version && echo '>>> Todo listo'
